title: Manufacturing Engineer - Parle Products - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Parle Products - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Parle Products has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Parle Products:
Parle Products is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Parle Products!
